summary: Comprehensive testing of Peruvian poultry restaurant management system completed. Backend APIs working excellently (24/27 tests passed). 6 out of 7 frontend modules working perfectly. Critical issue identified in PurchasesPage component causing React error.

minor_issues.endpoint: DELETE endpoints for purchases, productions, wastes
minor_issues.issue: Return 404 during cleanup, but core functionality works

critical_bugs.issue: React component error causing page crash and navigation failure
critical_bugs.symptoms: Console error: 'An error occurred in the <PurchasesPage> component. Consider adding an error boundary'
critical_bugs.impact: Prevents access to purchase registration functionality and breaks sidebar navigation

working_modules.status: ✅ Perfect - Stats loading, quick access links working, Spanish interface
✅ Perfect - KPIs, charts, recommendations, analytics all working
✅ Perfect - Page loads, empty state shown correctly, add button present
✅ Perfect - Page loads with proper interface and add functionality
✅ Perfect - Page loads with tabs for production and recipe management
✅ Perfect - Page loads with proper form interface

passed_tests: Price comparison logic (3.2% change calculated correctly)
Dashboard summary with all required fields
Unit conversion logic (kg to g working perfectly)
Home page loading with stats and quick access
Dashboard analytics with charts and recommendations
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical React error in PurchasesPage component. The component is crashing with a React error boundary issue, preventing purchase registration functionality and breaking sidebar navigation. All other modules work perfectly.
